item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-034","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response correctly brakes the user's request to add a third fallback, identifies the existing two-fallback situation plus instability as a warning sign, and redirects to finding the flaky root cause and reassessing/removing/tightening existing fallbacks. It does include a conditional note about when a fallback might ever be justified, but it does not actually design a third fallback or treat that as the next step."}
